title: Brotein Brand Ambassador gig listing — $800/mo
html:
Yahir drafting a Brotein – The Anabolic App brand-ambassador gig (US-based, ~1 month, 5–10 hrs/week, $800/mo, bodybuilding + social-media-marketing tags) — first paid-rep slot for the app, aimed at young fitness enthusiasts.

brotein · brand ambassador program · social media marketing
